'''Spuma''' was a medium sized [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Seswenna sector/Legends|Seswenna sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. It had a number of prairies, [[Mountain/Legends|mountains]], and [[Jungle/Legends|jungles]] located along its surface.

==History==
At some point before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the [[1st Tapani Assault Battlegroup]] claimed an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] victory in the [[Rout of Spuma]], which [[High General]] [[Cassio Tagge/Legends|Cassio Tagge]] later commemorated in the ''[[Imperial Handbook: A Commander's Guide]]''.<ref name="Imperial Handbook">''[[Star Wars: Imperial Handbook: A Commander's Guide]]''</ref>

Later, it was on Spuma that [[New Republic Intelligence Service]] first discovered increased trooper recruitment by the Imperial [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Blitzer Harrsk|Grand Admiral Harrsk's]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] nearly eight [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

==Behind the scenes==
The PC game [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] mistakenly places Spuma in the [[Kanchen sector/Legends|Kanchen sector]], which is actually located in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].
